title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates!
